*Base class for all optimizers.*

.. warning:: Parameters need to be specified as collections that have a
deterministic ordering that is consistent between runs. Examples of
objects that don’t satisfy those properties are sets and iterators over
values of dictionaries.

Args: params (iterable): an iterable of :class:`torch.Tensor` s or
:class:`dict` s. Specifies what Tensors should be optimized. defaults:
(dict): a dict containing default values of optimization options (used
when a parameter group doesn’t specify them).
